function.name: search_news_for_search_news
function.description: This is the subfunction for tool "search_news", you can use this tool. The description of this function is: "Use this API to get the top news globally or per topic and search for news by query and geographic area. Powered by Google News. For high volume / large scale plans, please check the [Real-Time News Data (Mega) API](https://rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3Qgu"

query.description: Search term. Must be non-empty. Example: 'OpenAI model release'.

function.name: search_news_v2_for_search_news_v2
function.description: This is the subfunction for tool "search_news_v2", you can use this tool. The description of this function is: "Use this API to get the top news globally or per topic and search for news by query and geographic area. Powered by Google News. For high volume / large scale plans, please check the [Real-Time News Data (Mega) API](https://rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3Qgu"

query.description: Search term. Must be non-empty. Example: 'OpenAI model release'.

function.name: latest_news_for_latest_news
function.description: This is the subfunction for tool "latest_news", you can use this tool. The description of this function is: "Use this API to get the top news globally or per topic and search for news by query and geographic area. Powered by Google News. For high volume / large scale plans, please check the [Real-Time News Data (Mega) API](https://rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3Qgu"

query.description: Search term. Must be non-empty. Example: 'OpenAI model release'.

function.name: Finish
function.description: If you believe that you have obtained a result that can answer the task, please call this function to provide the final answer. Alternatively, if you recognize that you are unable to proceed with the task in the current state, call this function to restart. Remember: you must ALWAYS call this function at the end of your attempt, and the only part that will be shown to the user is the final answer, so it should contain sufficient information.

final_answer.description: The final answer you want to give the user. You should have this field if "return_type"=="give_answer"

answer_generation.query: I’m tracking current events for a weekly tech brief. Please search for the latest news about OpenAI model releases or updates, and include at least 5 headlines from different outlets. For each headline, mention the date, the outlet, and a one-sentence description of what changed or what was announced.
